leadText: Liquidation (Japanese: アクアブレイク Aqua Break) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation VII. It is: TR98 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM110 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM076 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Liquidation does damage and has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by one stage. sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP S V The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat. LA The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target’s defensive stats. ZA The user attacks by slamming into targets using a full- force blast of water. This may also lower targets' Defense stats.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It could also lower the target's Defense.
